articles.title: Ripple’s XRP takes second place in trade in South Korea, beats ETH
articles.description: A recent survey by South Korea’s News1 has revealed that Bitcoin (BTC) continues to reign as the top cryptocurrency for domestic investors, while Ripple (XRP) has surpassed Ethereum (ETH) to claim the second spot. The survey, conducted from December 24 to 26, used a blockchain-based voting service, The POL, and gathered responses from over 5,220 […]

articles.title: Ripple Adopts Chainlink Standard to Boost RLUSD Integration with DeFi
articles.description: The post Ripple Adopts Chainlink Standard to Boost RLUSD Integration with DeFi appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News In a latest development, Ripple, announced on Tuesday that it will use data provider Chainlink’s (LINK) services to better integrate its RLUSD stablecoin with decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. Notably, this feature, which went live today on the Ethereum blockchain,...

articles.title: Ripple and Chainlink team up to further RLUSD adoption
articles.description: Ripple and Chainlink partner to bolster RLUSD adoption. RLUSD will leverage Chainlink’s standard to enhance the stablecoin’s utility and accessibility across DeFi. Ripple is teaming up with Chainlink to bring its recently unveiled stablecoin RLUSD to more users across the decentralized finance ecosystem. The RLUSD issuer, which is also behind the XRP cryptocurrency, announced this […] The post...

articles.title: Holoworld AI Brings Pudgy Penguins to Life with AI
articles.description: Now, your Pudgy Penguin isn’t just a collectible. It can learn from you and live a life of its own, thanks to the power of AI. Imagine this: your Pudgy Penguin can interact with you based on your tweets and the knowledge you share. Bring Your Pudgy Penguin to Life with AI and Twitter Integration […] The post Holoworld AI Brings Pudgy Penguins to Life with AI appeared first on Altcoin Buzz.

articles.title: Andrew Tate Launches BRUV Party, Eyes Bitcoin Reserve
articles.description: Tate has launched the BRUV Party, short for “Britain’s Resurgence Union.” His ultimate goal is to become the next Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. He wants to establish a national Bitcoin reserve as a top priority. Tate believes the UK is lagging when it comes to embracing Bitcoin. During a recent speech, he didn’t […] The post Andrew Tate Launches BRUV Party, Eyes Bitcoin Reserve appeared first on Altcoin Buzz.

articles.title: Cardano’s ADA Gathers Momentum as Investors Eye $3 Target
articles.description: Cardano’s ADA token is drawing attention as analysts suggest it may be on the verge of significant growth. The post Cardano’s ADA Gathers Momentum as Investors Eye $3 Target appeared first on Cryptodnes.
